title: Citrus Crumble Plum Crisp
description: A sweet dessert combining the flavors of citrus and plum with a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the plums and citrus juice.
In a separate bowl, combine the greek yogurt and a pinch of salt.
Transfer the plum mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish and top with the yogurt mixture.
In another bowl, combine the flour, oats, and brown sugar.
Add the melted butter to the dry ingredients and mix until crumbly.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the plum mixture.
Bake for 40-50 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
